case_title: DUNG TRONG LUU VS. EAN HOLDINGS, LLC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUU, DUNG TRONG AS TO DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS, LLC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS, LLC. KENDRICKS, ANDREW RENEE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,910.12 FILED BY LUU, DUNG TRONG AS TO DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS, LLC. KENDRICKS, ANDREW RENEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $100.00) SERVED FEB-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KENDRICKS, ANDREW RENEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LUU, DUNG TRONG EAN HOLDINGS, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF DUNG TRONG LUU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER, HONG HA #300215. DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY, DARREN HAYMEN, LIABILITY CLAIMS REP. DEFENDANT ANDREW KENDRICKS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-20-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUU, DUNG TRONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS, LLC. KENDRICKS, ANDREW RENEE $3,910.12 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EAN HOLDINGS, LLC.
